topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Rendering. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for AR/VR Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Rendering is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Rendering in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Rendering snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Rendering?
How does Rendering handle memory management?
